journal.summary: Designed the architecture and core modular views for DevJourney v0.1 personal OS.
Studied ES6 modules, custom events, and hash-based routing techniques.

projects.name: DevJourney
projects.description: Personal developer operating system for tracking learning, projects, journal, and blockers.

projects.name: Developer Portfolio

blockers.title: LocalStorage state validation on JSON import
blockers.description: Importing invalid JSON schema breaks application parsing.
blockers.whatWasTried: Added basic JSON parse try/catch but missed schema structure validation.
blockers.resolution: Created schema validation utility before saving imported state.

blockers.title: Calculating streak with gaps in journal entries
blockers.description: Streak counter needs to properly calculate consecutive active study days.
blockers.whatWasTried: Sorting dates descending and comparing date differences in days.
